/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Utility.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libUtility.bep -o libUtility.bep CMakeFiles/Utility.dir/Utility.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build -lUABE_Win32 ../../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build
